description: You have received a threat intelligence report containing 4 known bad MD5 hashes located in /home/ga/evidence/intel_hashes.txt. Your mission is to configure Autopsy to flag these files automatically when processing a seized USB drive. Create a Notable hash set named 'Intel_Targets' using the provided hashes. Establish a forensic case named 'Target_Hunting_2024' with case number 'INV-TGT-009' in /home/ga/Cases/. Analyze the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd using the Hash Lookup module configured with the 'Intel_Targets' hash set. Extract all resulting hash set hits to /home/ga/Reports/Hit_Exports/. Document the findings in a summary report at /home/ga/Reports/target_hit_report.txt using the format: 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-TGT-009', 'TOTAL_HITS: <N>', and 'HIT: <filename> | <md5_hash>' for each hit.
